description: Open the searchable OrbitFS command help window.
Open the main OrbitFS control panel on Startup.
Open the OrbitFS control panel on Files.
Open the OrbitFS control panel on Context.
Open the OrbitFS control panel on Vent.
Open the OrbitFS control panel on Journal.
Open the Startup UI to choose the project and load strength.
Fully load one complete text or DOCX file into active context.
List files and folders at the root or inside a folder.
Open a PDF, DOCX or text file in the expandable OrbitFS viewer.
Search file contents, optionally inside one folder.
Show file size, modified time and SHA-256 hash.
Create a browser link for a file that expires after 15 minutes.
Resolve and preview a move before the exact paths are confirmed.
Create a new folder at the supplied relative path.
Move a file or folder into _trash instead of hard deleting it.
Permanently empty _trash after listing and explicit confirmation.
Turn Pure Private Vent Mode on or off.
Save the final Vent draft before upload.
Upload the exact saved Vent draft without another confirmation.
Return the live OrbitFS panel, MCP, cloud and connection status.
